description_long: This sculpture features a detailed human figure, possibly a saint or historical figure, standing atop a tall, ornate column. The figure is dressed in flowing robes and holds an object in one hand, with the other arm bent at the elbow. The column is elaborately carved with a repeating pattern and rests on a square pedestal base adorned with decorative reliefs. The entire structure appears to be made of stone or a similar material, with a weathered, light beige surface. The sculpture is monumental in scale and would be a prominent feature in an urban or park setting.
description: A tall, ornate stone column topped with a robed human figure holding an object, set on a square pedestal base with decorative carvings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure facing forward, with both arms visible and the object held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure and the detailed folds of the robe, with the column's pattern visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and the column, with the figure's cape and the pedestal's rear reliefs in view.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile from the opposite side, emphasizing the arm position and column details.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure atop an ornate column
attribute_location_context: No specific context visible; likely intended for outdoor urban or park installation.
